items.description: Johnson & Johnson is a top dividend stock with over 60 years of payout growth, backed by strong profitability and a solid financial foundation.

items.title: Jim Cramer Says Stocks Like Johnson & Johnson “Simply Refuse to Quit”
items.description: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer commented on. Cramer showed an optimistic sentiment toward the stock, as he commented: Lilly’s not alone. The irrepressible Johnson & Johnson, along with the effervescent Merck and Amgen, they simply refuse to quit. Why not? Even after the runs they’ve had this year alone, […]
